title: Senior SAP S/4HANA Consultant
description: Lead SAP S/4HANA implementation and migration projects for enterprise clients. You will be responsible for solution architecture, business process design, and guiding client teams through digital transformation using SAP's latest technologies.
requirements: 8+ years of SAP consulting experience with minimum 2 full S/4HANA implementations
Deep expertise in SAP Activate methodology and SAP Cloud Platform
Experience in at least one functional module (FI/CO, MM, SD, PP) with cross-module integration knowledge
SAP S/4HANA certification required
Strong stakeholder management and team leadership skills
Willingness to travel up to 30% for client engagements

title: Cloud Architect — AWS
description: Design and implement enterprise-scale cloud architectures on AWS. You will lead cloud migration programs, establish cloud best practices, and mentor engineering teams in cloud-native application development.
requirements: 7+ years in cloud architecture with 5+ years focused on AWS
AWS Solutions Architect Professional certification required
Proven experience leading large-scale cloud migration programs (100+ workloads)
Expertise in infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, CDK), containers (ECS, EKS), and serverless computing
Strong understanding of cloud security, networking, and FinOps practices
Experience with hybrid cloud architectures and AWS Outposts

title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
description: Design, develop, and deploy machine learning solutions at enterprise scale. You will work on cutting-edge AI applications including NLP, computer vision, and predictive analytics for Fortune 500 clients.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in machine learning and deep learning
Strong proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn
Experience deploying ML models to production using MLflow, Kubeflow, or SageMaker
Understanding of MLOps practices including model monitoring, versioning, and governance
Experience with large language models and transformer architectures preferred
MS or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field

title: Cybersecurity Architect
description: Lead the design and implementation of enterprise security architectures for our clients. You will develop zero-trust strategies, security roadmaps, and manage complex security transformation programs.
requirements: 8+ years of cybersecurity experience with 3+ years in security architecture
CISSP, CISM, or equivalent certification required
Deep expertise in zero-trust architecture, identity management, and cloud security
Experience with security frameworks (NIST CSF, ISO 27001, CIS Controls)
Knowledge of compliance requirements (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS, GDPR)
Experience with SIEM, SOAR, EDR, and XDR platforms

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain enterprise-grade web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and scalable backend technologies. Work in cross-functional product teams delivering solutions that serve millions of users.
requirements: 4+ years of full-stack development experience
Expert-level proficiency in React/Next.js and Node.js/TypeScript
Experience with cloud services (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Database design experience with both SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, DynamoDB)
Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration
Strong CS fundamentals and system design skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Design, implement, and manage CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and infrastructure automation for enterprise clients. Drive DevOps transformation programs that accelerate software delivery.
requirements: 4+ years of DevOps/SRE experience
Expertise in Kubernetes, Docker, and container orchestration at scale
Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash, Go) and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi)
Experience with CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, ArgoCD)
Monitoring and observability experience (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, ELK)
Cloud platform certification (AWS, Azure, or GCP) preferred
